references.hebrew: לֹא־תַשִּׁ֣יךְ לְאָחִ֔יךָ נֶ֥שֶׁךְ כֶּ֖סֶף נֶ֣שֶׁךְ אֹ֑כֶל נֶ֕שֶׁךְ כׇּל־דָּבָ֖ר אֲשֶׁ֥ר יִשָּֽׁךְ׃
references.english: You shall not deduct interest from loans to your fellow Israelites, whether in money or food or anything else that can be deducted as interest;

references.hebrew: לֹא־תַעֲשֹׁ֥ק שָׂכִ֖יר עָנִ֣י וְאֶבְי֑וֹן מֵאַחֶ֕יךָ א֧וֹ מִגֵּרְךָ֛ אֲשֶׁ֥ר בְּאַרְצְךָ֖ בִּשְׁעָרֶֽיךָ׃
references.english: You shall not abuse a needy and destitute laborer, whether a fellow Israelite or a stranger in one of the communities of your land.

references.hebrew: לֹֽא־תַעֲשֹׁ֥ק אֶת־רֵֽעֲךָ֖ וְלֹ֣א תִגְזֹ֑ל לֹֽא־תָלִ֞ין פְּעֻלַּ֥ת שָׂכִ֛יר אִתְּךָ֖ עַד־בֹּֽקֶר׃
references.english: You shall not defraud your fellow.afellow I.e., fellow Israelite—whether male or female. In contrast to others “neighbor.” You shall not commit robbery. The wages of a laborer shall not remain with you until morning.

references.hebrew: וְכִֽי־תִמְכְּר֤וּ מִמְכָּר֙ לַעֲמִיתֶ֔ךָ א֥וֹ קָנֹ֖ה מִיַּ֣ד עֲמִיתֶ֑ךָ אַל־תּוֹנ֖וּ אִ֥ישׁ אֶת־אָחִֽיו׃
references.english: When you sell property to your neighbor,dneighbor I.e., fellow Israelite; see v. 46. or buy any from your neighbor, you shall not wrong one another.
